epigraph.quote: We stroked the sheep + one tried to chew my shorts.

moments.quote: drove over to Long Buckby to pick up John, Charles & Eve from the station

moments.place: Cherry Tree Farm, Woodford Halse, UK
moments.quote: superb views, a large field, no loos, hedges & trees, quite windy. Peter lost his boomerang as soon as we arrived.
